assets.prompt: A dimly lit technical blueprint emerges from charcoal, showing a skeletal wireframe structure suspended in negative space—half-built scaffolding or the internal framework of a building mid-construction. One section glows faintly in muted ochre, traced in clean white lines, revealing the hidden load-bearing logic beneath opaque surfaces. The rest dissolves into shadow. No people, no text, no literal representation—just the architectural ghost of a system designed to be read without its original architect present.

altText.en: Stacked cardboard filing boxes with handwritten labels in a dimly lit storage room
altText.es: Torres de cajas de archivo de cartón con etiquetas manuscritas en un cuarto de almacenamiento poco iluminado

caption.en: Your controller knows exactly where everything is—and that's the problem.
caption.es: Tu controller sabe exactamente dónde está todo—y ahí está el problema.
